title: I'm a Believer
why_this_song: I'm a Believer by The Monkees (1966) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I'm a believer, I couldn't leave her if I tried
I thought love was more or less a given thing
Seems the more I gave the less I got
I'm a believer, I couldn't leave her if I tried
Ah, love was out to get me (duh-duh-duh duh-duh)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "believer" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "believer" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "face" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "face" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Meant for someone else but not for me
When I needed sunshine, I got rain

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "I'm a Believer" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "I'm a Believer" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "I'm a Believer" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "I'm a Believer"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Monkees one question about "I'm a Believer", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Monkees sobre "I'm a Believer", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "I'm a Believer" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "I'm a Believer" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?
